name: awesome-android-root
description: Discover best root apps, Magisk, KernelSu & LSPosed(xposed) modules & rooting guides
readme_summary: Awesome Android Root is a comprehensive hub for Android rooting enthusiasts, offering a curated collection of over 500 top root apps, Magisk, KernelSU, and LSPosed modules, alongside detailed rooting guides for various devices. It aims to be a central resource for all things related to rooting and customizing Android devices.
key_features: Extensive collection of 500+ root apps and modules
Support for Magisk, KernelSU, and LSPosed (Xposed)
Step-by-step rooting guides for diverse devices
Categorized listing of apps and modules (Privacy, Performance, Gaming, etc.)
Web app for enhanced navigation and search
primary_use_case: To serve as a centralized, curated resource for discovering and learning about Android rooting tools, modules, and guides.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old librarian in a vast, magical library, surrounded by glowing Android devices. The librarian is carefully organizing and cataloging numerous colorful scrolls, each representing a different root app or module (Magisk, KernelSU, LSPosed). One scroll is unrolled, revealing a simplified, glowing map of an Android device, indicating a clear path for rooting. Subtle digital particles and faint code snippets float in the air, connecting the magical elements to technology. The repository name 'Awesome Android Root' is subtly etched on a nearby bookshelf. The scene is rendered in a vibrant, 3D isometric illustration style with a warm, inviting color palette, emphasizing discovery and knowledge.

name: restreamer
description: The Restreamer is a complete streaming server solution for self-hosting. It has a visually appealing user interface and no ongoing license costs. Upload your live stream to YouTube, Twitch, Facebook, Vimeo, or other streaming solutions like Wowza. Receive video data from OBS and publish it with the RTMP and SRT server.
readme_summary: Restreamer is a self-hosted, open-source streaming server solution that allows users to ingest live video streams (e.g., from OBS) via RTMP and SRT protocols. It then enables re-streaming to various platforms like YouTube, Twitch, and Vimeo, or embedding a player directly into a website. The solution offers a user-friendly interface, supports multiple codecs and protocols, and includes features for hardware acceleration and monitoring.
key_features: Re-stream to YouTube, Twitch, Vimeo, etc.
Multiple audio/video inputs, outputs, protocols, and codecs
Hardware acceleration support (Raspberry Pi, Nvidia Cuda, Intel VAAPI)
primary_use_case: To provide a self-hosted, flexible, and cost-effective solution for individuals and organizations to manage and distribute live video streams across multiple platforms and websites.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a central broadcasting tower acting as a hub. From its base, multiple streams of light (representing video data) flow in from various sources like a stylized OBS icon and a digital 'input' symbol. The tower then refracts these streams into numerous beams of light, each directed towards distinct, recognizable platform logos (YouTube, Twitch, Vimeo, etc.) and a small, embedded web player icon. Subtle digital particles and glowing data lines connect the elements, with the 'Restreamer' name subtly integrated into the tower's design. The overall mood is dynamic and connected, rendered in a clean, modern 3D isometric style with a bright, energetic color palette.

name: Triangle-Downloader
description: Chrome extension to download YouTube video/audio/subtitles by capturing the player stream. No yt-dlp.
readme_summary: Triangle Downloader is a Chrome extension for downloading YouTube video, audio, and subtitles directly within the browser. It captures the player stream locally without relying on external tools or servers, offering options for video quality, audio format, and subtitle extraction.
primary_use_case: Downloading YouTube video, audio, and subtitles directly from the YouTube player interface.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized, friendly triangle character, representing 'Triangle Downloader', is positioned next to a YouTube video player. The triangle is actively 'catching' streams of video, audio waves, and text (subtitles) flowing from the player into its geometric shape. These captured elements are then neatly organized and presented as downloadable icons (MP4, MP3, TXT) emanating from the triangle. The background is a clean, minimalist interface, with subtle digital particles and data streams flowing around the triangle, hinting at local processing. The overall mood is helpful and efficient, with a bright, clear color palette. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with smooth, rounded edges and clear iconography.

name: Menstrudel
description: Period tracking app - Free, offline, and open source.
readme_summary: Menstrudel is a free, open-source, and privacy-focused period and pill tracking mobile application built with Flutter. It offers offline functionality for logging menstrual cycles, tracking symptoms, predicting future periods, and managing medication schedules.
key_features: Log with a Tap for periods
Timely and customizable reminders for periods and LARC expiry
primary_use_case: To provide users with a private, offline, and intuitive mobile application for tracking their menstrual cycle, managing medications, and receiving timely reminders.
cover_image_prompt: A serene, stylized woman gently tending to a vibrant, blooming garden. Each flower represents a day, with some buds showing upcoming period predictions and others marked with a small pill icon for medication reminders. A subtle, glowing timeline flows through the garden, indicating past cycles and future forecasts. Small, unobtrusive UI elements like a calendar view and a simple graph are integrated into the background. The overall mood is peaceful and empowering, emphasizing personal health management. The art style should be a 3D isometric illustration with soft, natural lighting and a color palette of greens, blues, and gentle pastels. The repository name 'Menstrudel' is subtly etched on a garden stone.

name: transcriber
description: AI-powered transcription for audio & video with Whisper — self-hosted, fast, and open-source.
readme_summary: Transcriber is a self-hosted, open-source web application that leverages OpenAI Whisper and FastAPI for AI-powered audio and video transcription. It prioritizes user privacy by processing data locally and offers features like YouTube URL transcription, local file uploads, real-time progress updates via WebSockets, and a smart media library.
primary_use_case: To provide a private, self-hosted, and efficient solution for transcribing audio and video content from various sources, including YouTube and local files, using advanced AI models.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old owl, perched on a stack of digital audio and video files, meticulously transcribing spoken words into glowing text that floats around it. The owl's eyes are bright screens displaying real-time transcription progress and waveform visualizations. Subtle code snippets and data streams emanate from the files, feeding into the owl's transcription process. The background is a cozy, dimly lit study, emphasizing privacy and local processing. The overall mood is intelligent and efficient. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style with a clean, modern aesthetic, highlighting the transformation of raw media into organized, transcribed text.

name: ExploitDB-Hunter
description: Lightweight && straight forward command-line tool for searching and downloading exploits from Exploit-DB.
readme_summary: ExploitDB-Hunter is a lightweight Python command-line tool designed to simplify the process of searching and downloading exploits from the Exploit-DB database. It offers an interactive terminal interface, eliminating the need to manually browse the website.
key_features: Search exploits by CVE ID or title
Download exploits directly from the command line
Interactive terminal interface for selecting exploits
Filter exploits by type, platform, port, and tags
primary_use_case: To efficiently search for and download security exploits from Exploit-DB via a command-line interface, streamlining the workflow for information security professionals.
cover_image_prompt: A digital librarian with a magnifying glass and a glowing search beam meticulously sifting through a vast, organized library of digital scrolls, each representing a security exploit. The librarian points the beam at a specific scroll labeled 'CVE-2014-6271', causing it to glow and a digital copy to materialize in a clean, designated download folder. Subtle code snippets and data streams flow around the scene, with the repository name 'ExploitDB-Hunter' subtly integrated into a library catalog. The overall mood is one of focused efficiency and discovery, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a clean, modern aesthetic and a cool blue and green color palette.
